narrative:
Lake 6 (precinct in Stark County) has 1,209 registered voters, with 48.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.6 percentage points.
